2605.26567.title: MedGuideX: Internalizing Decision Logic from Executable Guidelines into Large Language Models for Clinical Reasoning
2605.26567.paper_summary: Clinical practice guidelines (CPGs) encode evidence-based decision logic that clinicians apply by evaluating patient variables, conditional criteria, and recommendation rules. However, existing methods often use CPGs as free-text training data or retrieval sources, underutilizing their procedural decision structure. To better exploit this structure, we introduce a guideline-derived training pipeline that transforms CPG recommendations into executable clinical decision logic and uses it to generate factual and counterfactual question-answering data. Theses data teach models both guideline-supported decisions and how decisions change under different patient conditions. Post-training a medical LLM on the generated data yields MedGuideX. Across four clinical reasoning benchmarks, MedGuideX achieves a 10.28% relative improvement in average accuracy. Physician evaluation further shows that MedGuideX better recovers clinician authored reasoning steps and produces physician-preferred rationales in faithfulness, validity, completeness, and clarity. Overall, our results show that executable decision logic from CPGs can be transformed into scalable supervision for building reliable medical LLMs.
2605.26567.paper_summary_zh: 臨床實踐指導方針（CPGs）編碼了基於證據的決策邏輯，臨床醫生通過評估患者變數、條件標準和建議規則來應用這些邏輯。<lb/>然而，現有的方法通常將CPGs用作自由文本訓練數據或檢索來源，未充分利用其程序性決策結構。<lb/>為了更好地利用這一結構，我們引入了一個基於指導方針的訓練流程，將CPG建議轉換為可執行的臨床決策邏輯，並利用它生成事實和反事實的問答數據。<lb/>這些數據教會模型既有指導方針支持的決策，也有在不同患者條件下決策如何改變的情況。<lb/>在生成數據上對醫療LLM進行後訓練，產生了MedGuideX。<lb/>在四個臨床推理基準中，MedGuideX在平均準確性上實現了10.28%的相對提升。<lb/>醫生評估進一步顯示，MedGuideX更好地恢復了臨床醫生撰寫的推理步驟，並在忠實性、有效性、完整性和清晰度方面產生了醫生偏好的理由。<lb/>總體而言，我們的結果顯示，來自CPGs的可執行決策邏輯可以轉化為可擴展的監督，從而構建可靠的醫療LLM。
2605.26567.author: Yuhao Shen et.al.
2605.26567.authors: Yuhao Shen, Lang Cao, Simo Du, Yuqing Wang, Juexiao Zhou, Hao Peng, Yue Guo
